title: artemisia arborescens f. rehan
intro: Artemisia arborescens f. rehan, also known as Rehan or Wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rehan include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Rehan can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
